Package org.eventb.core.preferences

Class CachedPreferenceMap<T>

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.preferences.CachedPreferenceMap<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
StorablePreferenceMap
public class CachedPreferenceMap<T> extends Object
A parameterized cache encapsulating a map of elements of typeT to be injected from a string (e.g. typically an eclipse preference) and extracted back to a string. This class is intended to be sub-classed by clients.
Since:
2.1

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CachedPreferenceMap(IPrefElementTranslator<T> translator)
    Deprecated.
    use CachedPreferenceMap(IXMLPrefSerializer, IReferenceMaker) instead

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    add(String name, T value)
    Adds a new item given its name and its value to the cache if an element with this name does not already exists .

    Adds a list of given IPrefMapEntry to the cache.

    Adds the given ICacheListener to the list of cache listeners.
    void

    Clears all entries from the cache.

    Tells is an element with the given name is contained by the cache.

    Returns the string value of the given element.

    getEntries()
    Returns all the entries of the cache.

    Returns the entry of the cache which has the given name, null if no entry with this name is in the cache.

    Returns all the entries' names in the cache.

    Loads the cache with elements created from the given string parameter.
    boolean
    isDefaultEntry(String name)
    Returns whether the given name is a key for a default entry in this preference map.
    IPreferenceCheckResult
    preAddCheck(String key, T value)
    Checks whether adding given key with given value into given map introduces cyclic references.
    void

    Remove the entries with the given names from the cache.

  • Constructor Details

    • CachedPreferenceMap

      @Deprecated public CachedPreferenceMap(IPrefElementTranslator<T> translator)
      Deprecated.
      use CachedPreferenceMap(IXMLPrefSerializer, IReferenceMaker) instead
      Creates a cache for the old serialization format. Do not use anymore, except in code for backward compatibility.
      Parameters:
      translator - a preference translator

    • CachedPreferenceMap

      public CachedPreferenceMap(IXMLPrefSerializer<T> translator, IReferenceMaker<T> refMaker)
      Since:
      2.3

  • Method Details

    • inject

      public IInjectLog inject(String pref) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Loads the cache with elements created from the given string parameter.

      If inject fails, an IllegalArgumentException is thrown.

      Parameters:
      pref - the information to load the cache with
      Returns:
      a log with errors and warnings about encountered problems
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - in case of failure
      Since:
      3.0

    • extract

      public String extract()
      Returns the string value of the given element. It uses the translator given at instantiation to typically give a significant string representation for the storage of the cache in a preference.
      Returns:
      the string value of the given element

    • add

      public void add(String name, T value)
      Adds a new item given its name and its value to the cache if an element with this name does not already exists .
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the entry to be added in the cache
      value - the value of the entry to be added in the cache

    • addAll

      public List<IPrefMapEntry<T>> addAll(List<IPrefMapEntry<T>> entries)
      Adds a list of given IPrefMapEntry to the cache.
      Parameters:
      entries - the entries to add
      Returns:
      the entries which were actually added to the cache

    • preAddCheck

      public IPreferenceCheckResult preAddCheck(String key, T value)
      Checks whether adding given key with given value into given map introduces cyclic references.

      If the given key already exists, it is considered as a replacement, so the corresponding entry is not taken into account, only the new one.

      Parameters:
      key - a new map key
      value - a value about to be added
      Returns:
      a IPreferenceCheckResult
      Since:
      2.3

    • exists

      public boolean exists(String name)
      Tells is an element with the given name is contained by the cache.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the element to search for
      Returns:
      true if the element is in the cache, false otherwise

    • getEntries

      public List<IPrefMapEntry<T>> getEntries()
      Returns all the entries of the cache.
      Returns:
      all the entries of the cache

    • getEntry

      public IPrefMapEntry<T> getEntry(String name)
      Returns the entry of the cache which has the given name, null if no entry with this name is in the cache.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the entry to return
      Returns:
      the registered entry with the given name, null if no entry with this name is in the cache.

    • getEntryNames

      public Set<String> getEntryNames()
      Returns all the entries' names in the cache.
      Returns:
      the entries' names in the cache

    • remove

      public void remove(String... names)
      Remove the entries with the given names from the cache.

      Important: don't use remove() then add() to rename an entry. Instead, use getEntry().setKey().

      Parameters:
      names - the names of the entries to remove

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clears all entries from the cache.
      Since:
      2.3

    • addListener

      public void addListener(ICacheListener<T> listener)
      Adds the given ICacheListener to the list of cache listeners.
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to be added

    • isDefaultEntry

      public boolean isDefaultEntry(String name)
      Returns whether the given name is a key for a default entry in this preference map.
      Parameters:
      name - an entry name
      Returns:
      true if default entry, false otherwise
      Since:
      3.0
